name: Review Analysis
description: When user review on a content, webhook trigger. The review save into mysql database review table. Check the review if it is less than 3 , review is saved to alart table. And automatically notice it in telegram. And user forward this notice in whatsapp

data.label: Insert Feedback into MySQL

config.query: INSERT INTO feedback (customer_id, rating, comments) VALUES (?, ?, ?)
